zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Brereton於1458年出生在英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可時，她的父親Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton44歲，母親Philippa Elanor de Hulse44歲。她於大約1457年與Sir John Thomas Radcliffe在英國英格蘭藍卡爾奧爾德薩爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1497年4月12日在英國藍卡爾奧爾德薩爾享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Brereton于1458年出生在英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可时，她的父亲Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton44岁，母亲Philippa Elanor de Hulse44岁。她于大约1457年与Sir John Thomas Radcliffe在英国英格兰藍卡爾奧爾德薩爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1497年4月12日在英国藍卡爾奧爾德薩爾享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brereton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Brereton, in Cheshire and Staffordshire, and sometimes from Brearton in Yorkshire or Brierton in Durham. Brereton in Staffordshire is named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + Old English dūn ‘hill’ as its final element; the others are named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Brewerton
meanings: English: variant of   Brereton  , the result of confusion by folk etymology with the occupational name   Brewer  .

variants.name: Brierton
meanings: English: habitational name from Brierton in County Durham (formerly in Yorkshire) or Brearton in North Yorkshire, which are both named with Old English brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘farmstead’, or Brereton in Cheshire, which has the same origin (see Brereton ).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Brereton was born in 1458, in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton, was 44 and her mother, Philippa Elanor de Hulse, was 44. She married Sir John Thomas Radcliffe about 1457, in Ordsall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 12 April 1497, in Ordsall, Lancashire, England, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Brereton est née en 1458, à Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Philippa Elanor de Hulse, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Thomas Radcliffe environ 1457, à Ordsall, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 avril 1497, à Ordsall, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Brereton 1458 in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton 44 und ihre Mutter Philippa Elanor de Hulse 44. Sie hat um 1457 in Ordsall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Thomas Radcliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. April 1497 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Ordsall, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Brereton è nata il nel 1458 nel Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Philippa Elanor de Hulse, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Thomas Radcliffe circa 1457, nel Ordsall, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 aprile 1497, nel Ordsall, Lancashire, England, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Breretonが1458年にイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィックで生まれた時，父Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Breretonは44歳，母Philippa Elanor de Hulseは44歳であった。約1457年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアオルドサルでSir John Thomas Radcliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1497年4月12日にイギリスランカシュアイアオルドサルで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Brereton(이)가 1458년 영국 체실르 브레레턴 c 스멧h윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa Elanor de Hulse(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 대략 1457년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 르드사에서 Sir John Thomas Radcliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1497년 4월 12일 영국 랭카실르 르드사에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Brereton nasceu em 1458, em Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Elanor de Hulse, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Thomas Radcliffe aproximadamente 1457, em Ordsall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de abril de 1497, em Ordsall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Brereton родилась в 1458 г. в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa Elanor de Hulse, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Thomas Radcliffe около 1457 г. в местности ордсалл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 12 апреля 1497 г. в местности ордсалл, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Brereton nació en 1458, en Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Brereton 10th Lord of Brereton, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Philippa Elanor de Hulse, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Sir John Thomas Radcliffe aproximadamente 1457, en Ordsall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de abril de 1497, en Ordsall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años.
